title: Closed polygonal cell shipping pallet
abstract: Shipping pallets with a single-piece base, where the base is a substantially planar substrate with a top side and a bottom side, the pallet including a plurality of feet formed from depressions in the substrate, where each foot protrudes from the bottom side of the substrate in an arcuate fashion, and a plurality of partitions are disposed normally from the top side of the substrate with each partition smoothly meeting the substrate in an arcuate fashion. A lid is configured to fit atop the single-piece base covering the plurality of partitions to form a closed polygon cell system. In some examples, the partitions form chambers with four, five, six, eight, or twenty sides.
claims: Claims Claims: 1. A shipping pallet, comprising: a single-piece base, the base further comprising; a substantially planar substrate with a top side and a bottom side, a plurality of feet formed from depressions in the substrate such that each foot protrudes from the bottom side of the substrate in an arcuate fashion, and a plurality of partitions disposed normally from the top side of the substrate, with each partition smoothly meeting the substrate in an arcuate fashion; and a lid configured to fit atop the single-piece base covering the plurality of partitions to form a closed polygon cell system. 2. The shipping pallet of claim 1, wherein the plurality of partitions is a patterned rib structure made of polygonal shapes. 3. The shipping pallet of claim 2, wherein the polygonal shapes are primarily any polygonal shape with a number of sides in a range from four sides to twenty sides. 4. The shipping pallet of claim 2, wherein the polygonal shapes primarily includes a hexagonal shape. 5. The shipping pallet of claim 2, wherein the polygonal shape primarily includes a pentagonal shape. 6. The shipping pallet of claim 2, wherein the polygonal shape primarily includes an octagonal shape. 7. The shipping pallet of claim 1, wherein the plurality of feet are formed from depressions in the substrate such that each of the feet are hollow, and the plurality of partitions extend into the feet which are hollow and smoothly meet the top of the substrate inside the hollow feet in an arcuate fashion. 8. The shipping pallet of claim 1, wherein the single piece base is formed by a single injection molding process. 9. The shipping pallet of claim 1, wherein the depressions of the feet form an angle with the bottom of the substrate, where the angle is obtuse and the depressions of the feet and the substrate form a flattened domed structure. 10. A shipping pallet, comprising: a substrate with a top side and bottom side; a plurality of feet formed from the substrate and that protrude from the plane of the substrate normal to the bottom side, thereby creating corresponding depressions in the top side of the substrate; and a rib structure disposed on the top side of the substrate that meets the substrate in an arcuate fashion, the rib structure comprised of a series of polygonal shapes and covering substantially all of the top side of the substrate, with the rib structure extending into the depressions created by the plurality of feet. 11. The shipping pallet of claim 10, wherein the polygonal shapes are primarily any polygonal shape with a number of sides in a range from four sides to twenty sides. 12. The shipping pallet of claim 10, wherein the polygonal shapes primarily includes a hexagonal shape. 13. The shipping pallet of claim 10, wherein the polygonal shape primarily includes a pentagonal shape. 14. The shipping pallet of claim 10, wherein the polygonal shape primarily includes an octagonal shape. 15. The shipping pallet of claim 10, wherein the rib structure extends into the depressions created by the plurality of feet and smoothly meet the top side of the substrate in an arcuate fashion. 16. The shipping pallet of claim 10, wherein the substrate, the plurality of feet, and the rib structure are formed by a single injection molding process. 17. The shipping pallet of claim 10, wherein the polygonal shapes have a width, where the width is a minimum of four inches in diameter. 18. The shipping pallet of claim 10, further comprising; a lid configured to fit atop the rib structure covering the rib structure to form a closed polygon cell system. 19. A shipping pallet, comprising: a single-piece base, the base further comprising; a substantially planar substrate with a top side and a bottom side, a plurality of feet formed from depressions in the substrate such that each foot protrudes from the bottom side of the substrate in an arcuate fashion, and a plurality of chambers formed on the top side of the substrate, where each chamber includes a plurality of chamber walls to create the chamber with each chamber wall smoothly meeting the substrate in an arcuate fashion; and a lid configured to fit atop the single-piece base covering the plurality of chambers to form a closed polygon cell system. 20. The shipping pallet of claim 19, wherein each chamber includes a diameter, wherein the diameter may be in a range from four inches to sixteen inches.
